titleStmt.title: SII 20.149: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 149. (B.K. No. 68 of 1937-38.) SANKH, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Three fragments of slabs built into the wall of the ruined village-chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription which appears to refer to the reign of Bijjala, ruling from Maṁgaḷivēḍa, records a gift of land and oil-mill made for the worship and offerings to god Mahimēśvara of Saṅka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda maṁḍaḷēsvarakā puravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇṇa vṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirghghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷaturyyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṇḍaṁ mānakaḷakācaḷaṁ subha
ṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ gajarāyasaraṇā jrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkēsvaraṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ sanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ nissaṁkamalla nāmādisamastaprasa
stisahitaṁ śrīmatu bhujabaḷacakravartti bi maṁgaḷivēḍadali suṁkasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyutavi va saṁvachcharada puśya Amavasye sūryyagrahaṇa sōmavāradaṁdu
saṁkada śrī mahimēsvaradēvarige bijjaladēva kavāgi mahimēsvaradēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga dhūpārati nivēdya caitra pavitra sōtesuṇṇa Intinitakke sarbbanamasyavāgi biṭṭa
bhūmi 12 gēṇa kōla mattaru 24 ttaru mane 12 keya tōṭa 2 gāṇa Oṁdu 1 suṁka 1 maḷave gaḷde 12 I Ārādaru pratipāḷisuvudu [.] svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta
dhara ṣaṣṭirvvarśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē raṁ karamāsritya gōsahasravadhēna ca karamāśritya ca gavāṁ gō
Digital edition of SII 20.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
